name: localized narrowing of esophagus
description: Focal constriction of the esophagus, possibly due to stricture or external compression.

attributes.name: descriptors
attributes.description: Descriptors that may be used to characterize the esophageal stricture

values.name: patulous
values.description: Esophageal stricture is characterized as patulous

values.name: distended
values.description: Esophageal stricture is characterized as distended

values.name: fluid-filled
values.description: Esophageal stricture is characterized as fluid-filled

attributes.name: location_of_stricture
attributes.description: The location of the esophageal stricture

values.name: proximal esophagus
values.description: Esophageal stricture is located in the proximal esophagus

values.name: middle esophagus
values.description: Esophageal stricture is located in the middle esophagus

values.name: distal esophagus
values.description: Esophageal stricture is located in the distal esophagus

values.name: gastroesophageal junction
values.description: Esophageal stricture is located at the gastroesophageal junction

attributes.name: presence
attributes.description: Presence or absence of localized narrowing of esophagus

values.name: absent
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus is absent

values.name: present
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus is present

values.name: indeterminate
values.description: Presence of localized narrowing of esophagus cannot be determined

values.name: unknown
values.description: Presence of localized narrowing of esophagus is unknown

attributes.name: change from prior
attributes.description: Whether and how a localized narrowing of esophagus has changed over time

values.name: unchanged
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus is unchanged

values.name: stable
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus is stable

values.name: new
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus is new

values.name: resolved
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus seen on a prior exam has resolved

values.name: increased
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus has increased

values.name: decreased
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus has decreased

values.name: larger
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus is larger

values.name: smaller
values.description: Localized narrowing of esophagus is smaller
